narrative: Keep 4 reconcile runs/day but move them off their current 7am/12pm/6pm/10pm ET slots. 7am duplicates the 6:57am Morning Brief drain and 6pm duplicates the 6:03pm EOD drain on weekdays — both waste fires. Goal: fill actual gaps across weekday AND weekend (same cron serves both). Proposals to evaluate: (A) 10:30am / 2pm / 4:30pm / 10pm ET — fills weekday afternoon gap (3:23pm SC→6:03pm EOD) and weekend afternoons; overnight gap stays 9h. (B) 3am / 10:30am / 3pm / 8pm ET — shaves overnight gap to 7h by adding a pre-dawn anchor. After applying new cron in routines UI, update prompts/reconcile.md line 3 to match. EST flip each Nov.
